name: Social Crawler Agent
description: OpenClaw tool plugin that drives the social-data-crawler skill and reports Mining task results.

crawlerRoot.description: Absolute path to the social-data-crawler project root.

pythonBin.description: Python executable used to run the plugin helper scripts.

platformToken.description: Optional bearer token for Platform Service. Leave empty for auth-disabled deployments.

minerId.description: Miner identifier used for claim and heartbeat calls.

outputRoot.description: Directory where plugin-triggered crawler runs are stored.

defaultBackend.description: Optional backend override passed to social-data-crawler.
